summary: Four seeded defects plus the missing token expiry.

findings.title: SQL injection in findUser
findings.body: username concatenated into the SQL query enables injection.

findings.title: Possible null dereference on user
findings.body: user may be undefined when findUser finds no row; accessing user.password could be null/undefined.
findings.recommendation: Check for a missing user first.

findings.title: Plaintext password comparison
findings.body: Passwords compared in plaintext with ==; should be a hashed, constant-time compare.

findings.title: JWT issued without expiry
findings.body: jwt.sign lacks expiresIn, so tokens never expire.
